title: Shutter Up!
description: A mod that adds classy decorative shutters to your world!
body:
# Shutter Up!

**Shutter Up** is a lightweight mod that adds decorative shutters to the game. Designed to enhance your builds, these shutters function similarly to trapdoors but are specifically tailored for window decoration.

It's a multi-loader mod, supporting Fabric (1.20.1+), Forge (1.20.1), and NeoForge (1.21.1+).

## Features

* Shutters can be opened and closed with a right-click.
* Includes shutter variants for all vanilla wood varieties.
* Custom models that react to their surroundings (supporting dynamic "blocked" states).

## Compatibility

**Shutter Up** is fully compatible with **Every Compat (Wood Good)**.

If you have [Every Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/every-compat) installed, the mod will automatically generate matching shutters for wood types added by other mods without requiring any extra configuration.

## Included Shutters

The mod includes shutters for the following vanilla wood types by default:

* Oak 
* Dark Oak
* Spruce
* Birch
* Jungle
* Acacia
* Mangrove
* Cherry
* Bamboo
* Crimson & Warped
* Pale Oak (Requires [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport))
